# Size

**Data field**

The number of bytes in this reference movie atom.

## Data fields

- **Type**: The type of this atom.
- **Reference movie descriptor atom**: A reference movie atom must contain at least one reference movie descriptor atom, and typically contains more than one.

items.description: A reference movie atom must contain at least one reference movie descriptor atom, and typically contains more than one.
